title: cola macrocarpa
intro: Cola macrocarpa, also known as the bitters or Kola nut, is a plant species in the family Sterculiaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds which contain caffeine and other xanthines, making it a traditional remedy for various ailments. The health benefits of Cola macrocarpa include its ability to stimulate the nervous system, improve mental clarity, and provide relief from fatigue and headaches. In herbal preparations, the seeds are often dried and used as a stimulant or in traditional medicine, while the root bark is used to treat fever and digestive issues.
